title: Senior Business Development Manager at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
We at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Coimbatore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates:
Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates!
